examples: It criticizes the main contractor for seriously erring in its estimates.
While we invoke the precautionary principle, which always recommends erring on the side of caution, we have to recognize there will be trade-offs to be made.
Instead of bludgeoning our erring comrades, we should help them with criticism.
The school said it posed "minimal threat" but it was "erring on the side of caution".
The proportion of erring priests is far lower than the eager press would have it.
